description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing female figure adorned with elaborate headgear and detailed drapery. The figure holds an object in her hands at chest level, and her facial features are delicately rendered. The back of the sculpture is richly decorated with large floral motifs and organic forms, suggesting a connection to nature or mythology. The base is circular and textured, providing stability and a sense of grounding. The surface appears weathered, with some damage visible on the head and upper sections, indicating age or exposure to the elements.
description: A detailed standing female figure with ornate headgear and floral decorations on the back, holding an object at her chest. The sculpture is weathered and stands on a circular base.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the female figure's face, chest, and the object she holds, with clear details of her attire and headgear.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the figure and the depth of the floral decorations extending from her back.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by large, sculpted floral motifs and organic shapes, obscuring most of the figure's body.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile and the intricate floral elements cascading down her back.
attribute_subject_matter: standing female figure with floral motifs
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the background is isolated and neutral.
